{{- /* Prev/next pager over the current page's siblings, ordered by weight (ascending) - i.e. the same order as the sidebar. Hugo's built-in .PrevInSection/.NextInSection follow the default sort and are named opposite to reading order, so we resolve neighbours explicitly to avoid the confusion. */ -}} {{- $pages := .Parent.RegularPages.ByWeight -}} {{- $prev := false -}} {{- $next := false -}} {{- range $i, $p := $pages -}} {{- if eq $p.RelPermalink $.RelPermalink -}} {{- if gt $i 0 -}}{{- $prev = index $pages (sub $i 1) -}}{{- end -}} {{- if lt (add $i 1) (len $pages) -}}{{- $next = index $pages (add $i 1) -}}{{- end -}} {{- end -}} {{- end -}} {{ if or $prev $next }}
{{ with $prev }} ← {{ i18n "pager_prev" }} {{ .Title }} {{ else }}{{ end }} {{ with $next }} {{ i18n "pager_next" }} → {{ .Title }} {{ else }}{{ end }}
{{ end }}
